commands.summary: [AC-1] scripts/demo-state.mjs (npm run demo:state) — seeded LearnerState from real content; dates float, content selection stable
[AC-1] scripts/screenshots.mjs (npm run screenshots) — Playwright capture at 1440x900@2x, auto-generates demo state if missing
[AC-1] docs/screenshots/README.md documents the process and shot list; demo-state.json git-ignored as a regenerated intermediate
[AC-2] docs/screenshots/01..08 regenerated incl. track switcher, Performance objective heatmap, and the multi-select format
[AC-2] README screenshot section updated with multi-track switcher, performance, and multi-select shots
[AC-3] docs/getting-started.md — install/first run, track choice, study loop, backups, first-week plan
[AC-3] docs/contributor-onboarding.md — repo map, dev loop, validation gates, adding content/tracks; linked from CONTRIBUTING.md
[AC-4] src/App.tsx Onboarding component: 4-step dialog, keyboard navigable, dismiss persists skillforge-onboarded flag
[AC-4] Shows only on a genuinely fresh install; replay button in Preferences
[AC-4] Browser-verified: steps navigate, Get started/Skip dismiss + persist, no reappear on reload, replay reopens

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
